body.body: Implement #246. (1) Wire NE internal_state valence → milieu contribution as reward signal on resolution. (2) Seed curiosity habit: fires on idle state (low TWM urgency + no active attractor) → pushes observation to go explore something from watchlist/reading queue. Defer temporal credit assignment until Igor has enough episodic history. Prerequisite: T-self-observation-243 must be done first. Post plan before implementing.
body.title: Intrinsic motivation: curiosity + milieu-as-fuel (#246)
body.result:
PLAN (awaiting Designer approval):

## Sub-task 1: NE resolution reward signal

NE internal_state.valence → milieu is ALREADY wired via ingest_ne_state() called in background NE runs (~line 4389). Gap: this fires in background daemon, not on turn resolution. Task wants a per-turn reward hook.

### File: wild_igor/igor/cognition/milieu.py (MEDIUM)
- Add RESOLUTION_ALPHA_UP=0.15, RESOLUTION_ALPHA_DOWN=0.04 constants (between weak NE_ALPHA and strong direct-interaction ALPHA)
- Add ingest_resolution_reward(valence: float): updates valence only with resolution alphas; contributes to global if delta >= SPIKE_THRESHOLD. Docstring: 'per-turn reward signal from NE on resolution of a turn'

### File: wild_igor/igor/main.py (MEDIUM)
- Add self._last_ne_valence: float = 0.0 to IgorProcess.__init__ (~line 416)
- In NE background thread result handler (~line 4386-4389), also store: self._last_ne_valence = float(_ne_state.get('valence', 0.0))
- Add _apply_resolution_reward() helper (~10 lines): if self._last_ne_valence != 0.0: calls milieu.get().ingest_resolution_reward(self._last_ne_valence); does nothing if milieu not init'd; never raises
- Call self._apply_resolution_reward() at line 4336 just before 'return response_text' (only fires when turn actually produces a response, not on errors)

## Sub-task 2: CuriositySource + idle curiosity habit

### File: wild_igor/igor/cognition/push_sources.py (LOW)
Add CuriositySource(BasePushSource):
- MIN_INTERVAL_SEC = 300; IDLE_URGENCY_MAX = 0.35; TOPIC_COOLDOWN_SEC = 600
- push() logic:
  1. Rate-limit check
  2. Idle check: cortex.twm_get_attractor() returns None or weight < 0.1
  3. Max urgency check: read TWM obs (limit=10), max urgency < IDLE_URGENCY_MAX
  4. If idle: get watch habits → extract watch_label as topics; fallback 'reading queue' if empty
  5. Pick topic not in recent cooldown (round-robin index stored on self)
  6. Push ACTION_IMPULSE|CURIOSITY|topic={topic}|action=You have idle time. Explore or read about: {topic} to TWM with source='proactive_habit' (so _drain_action_impulses picks it up), salience=0.5, urgency=0.4, ttl=600
  7. Track topic in self._topic_cooldowns = {topic: datetime}
- Wire curiosity_source singleton into run_background_sources()

### File: claudecode/seed_curiosity_habits.py (new, LOW)
Seeds PROC_CURIOSITY_IDLE into live DB:
- memory_type=PROCEDURAL, habit_type='context_inject' (falls through to LLM with context)
- narrative: 'When the system has been idle with no active attractor, notice what is on the watchlist or reading queue and consider exploring one item proactively.'
- metadata: {habit_type: 'context_inject', trigger: 'idle_time', curiosity_source: true}
- No trigger matching needed (CuriositySource bypasses BG scoring)

## Risk assessment
- milieu.py changes: LOW — new method, new constants, no changes to existing code paths
- main.py changes: LOW — storing one float, new helper method, one call at existing return site
- push_sources.py: LOW — new class following established BasePushSource pattern; crashes silently
- Seed script: LOW — standalone script, only adds one memory
- Note: _drain_action_impulses already accepts source='proactive_habit' — CuriositySource reuses this path without main.py filter changes

## What is NOT in scope (deferred per task body)
- Temporal credit assignment (deferred until Igor has episodic history)
- SelfObservationSource from T-243 (T-243 marked done; CuriositySource is independent)

Ready to implement on Designer approval.
